tagline: Keep your projects in sync across devices.
longDescription:
Keeps your YouCoded toolkit state — config, journal entries, encyclopedia, inbox, themes, captured notes — in sync across every device you use Claude on. Three pluggable backends (Google Drive via rclone, GitHub via a private repo, iCloud via the native folder) — pick the one you already trust and the skill handles upload/download/conflict resolution on every session start and end.

Distinguishes portable state (`config.json`, encyclopedia, journal — synced) from machine-local state (`config.local.json`, caches, OS-specific paths — never synced) so devices don't fight each other over who-runs-where settings. Works invisibly via the SessionStart and SessionEnd hooks once configured; you can also trigger a manual sync any time with "sync now".
